commands.summary: 703 passed, up from 635 at admission; 68 new tests across the record family, every rejection class, all five non-resolution reasons, the nine conditions, and the capture path.

commands.command: git fetch origin main && git reset --hard origin/main && python3 -m pytest -q
commands.summary: Independent cross-environment reproduction from the public repository at 40bc540: 703 passing, verified_current audit, byte-identical file checksums.

summary: Verified completion of PLAN-20260723-0001 at commit 40bc540: ABS-0004 v5 Slice B catalog identity resolution. All nine scope items are delivered. ai_lab/providers/catalog.py defines schema v1 for ModelIdentity, ServiceEndpointIdentity, atomic CatalogAssertion, CatalogSnapshot, and CatalogCapture with validators, deterministic identities and paths, and canonical serialization. ai_lab/providers/catalog_resolution.py provides the pure resolution function, the five enumerated non-resolution reasons, and the append-only IdentityResolution annotation. ai_lab/providers/catalog_capture.py provides fixture replay by default and live fetch behind an explicit opt-in. All nine WARR-20260723-0001 conditions are evidenced by tests: condition 1 by contradicted_evidence blocking resolution before any other check; condition 2 by asserting the channel status line is exactly one line after the content status line in both capture and annotation serializations, with CATALOG_RECORDS.md stating that adjacency is a mitigation and not a control; condition 3 by disjoint status vocabularies checked at import, by both build_capture status parameters having no defaults, and by tests that each field rejects the other's values and that the two vary independently; condition 4 by the declared thirty-day window with tests exactly at the boundary, one second past it, and reconfigured to one hundred eighty days; condition 5 by determinism tests for identity, path, canonical bytes, and fifty repeated resolutions; condition 6 by annotations inheriting the capture's evidence class including the unassessed case; condition 7 by GraphRelation-shaped emission restricted to the four registered Slice B predicates; condition 8 by a regression that resolves every real captured InvocationRecord in the repository and asserts each file is byte-identical afterward; condition 9 by documented microsecond precision with tests for the inclusive boundary, one microsecond past, and offset normalization. The provider_self_report constraint of ABS-0004 v5 is enforced: a self-report capture carrying independently_corroborated is rejected, and a strong channel status does not license a strong content status. Resolution operates on real data: the invocation records captured at COMP-0035 and COMP-0036 resolve to ModelIdentities carrying self_asserted evidence, with their files unchanged. Tests grew from 635 to 703; the repository audit reports ok true verified_current; commit 40bc540 pulled from the public GitHub repository into a separate environment reproduced 703 passing tests, the verified_current audit, and byte-identical checksums for every delivered file.
